titleStmt.title: SII 24.72: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 72. (A.R. No. 112 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to Guṇa valli alias Peṇḍāṭṭi Kaḍavūruḍaiyāḷ, a resident of Tirukkaḍavūr in Ākūrnāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, towards charity, under orders of Rājēndra-Mūvēndavēḷār. The inscription was ordered to be engraved on the wall of the Rājamahēndraṉ-tiruchchuṟṟu. Mentions Vīra Vichchādhara Mū[vēnda ?] vēḷār, the headman (kiḻavaṉ) of Pālaiyūr. The record is dated in the 25th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇaril Akaḻ cū[ ḻ*n=ta] puviyil ponnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jeyamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matu varaiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṇai kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriya vā ḻvali kāṭṭippoṟ rttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai
kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum naṉṉilappāvait tanimaiyu n=ta(ta)vira vantu punitaṟ tirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit taṉṉaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭa muṭiyākat toṉṉila ven=tar cūṭa muṉṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai cella veṇ kuṭai Iru nila vaḷākam l veṇṇilāt tikaḻa meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa
corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tenṉavan karun=talai parun=talaittiṭat taṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa pinnāḷ pi piṟai niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kai villetir koṭā vikkalaṉ kallatir naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattirai Aḷavuṟṟa veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa kūṟina vīramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa
cai tannāḷukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutukum payantetir māṟina jeyapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻum celviyum viṭṭa maṭa(ṭa)ntaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅka maṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oruvicaikkaik koṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkamum poru parit talaṅkaḷum
ṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tanperuñ ceṉaiyai yevip pañcavarayvar poruta ñcamaṟ kaḷattañci veru neḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭa ṟattuṭaittu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum koṟṟa veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vija[ yastampan] ticaitoru niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻ potiyinu matta veṅkari paṭumaiyyaccaiyamum kanniyum kaik koṇṭa
lai kāṭṭi kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷacāverellām tani vicum pera(ri)maā veṟiya tan varupirit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷ Iṭṭaruḷi tiraikoḷ vīra ciṅkācanam tiriyaviṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramum tirupuyattalaṅkalum pola ramum tiyaākamum viḷaṅka vīṟṟiruntaruḷi kovirājakecaripanmarāna śrī (ko) kolottuṅkacoḻa devarkku Iyāṇṭu 25 Āvatu Āḻvār ceykiṟa yirā
centira muventaveḷār Evalpaṭi śrīvayiṣṇavavāriyañ ceykiṟa vaṭa maturai yanantā nampiyum cempiyan mātevi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa nampiyum perumpuliyūr Anan=ta nārāyaṇanampiyum Ālūr tirunāṭuṭaiya nampiyum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiru vāykkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkanum Āritan kecuvan taniyiḷañciṅkamum pāratāyan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa śrīviṣṇunampiyum pāratāyan kecuvan
Aṟivariyānum pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirāmanum pāratāyan kūttan tiruveṅkaṭamum kāśyapan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum sabhaikkaṇakku tiruvānai kāval periyānāna karuṇākarappiriyanum śrī vaiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭam tiruvāykkulamuṭaiyānum Āḻvār kanmikaḷom jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭu Ākūr nāṭṭu tirukaṭavūryirukkum peṇṭāṭṭi kaṭavūruṭaiyāḷukku tanmañ ceyya nāṅkaḷaṭuttuk tu Āḻvār tiru
maṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna keraḷāntaka vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu taṇṭuṟai nilattum kāraikkuṭi nilattum kāverik kulai Uṭaittu maṇaliṭṭu nūṟu samvatsaram Uttecappaṭi maṇaliṭāyk kiṭanta nilattil Ivaḷukku nāṅkaḷaṭuttuk kuṭutta nilattil kīḻpāṟk kellai maṇameṭṭukku merkkum tenpārkkellai merpaṭiyūr cāttakuṭi maṇa kum mipāṟ kellai coḻapāṇṭiya
tevar tirunan=tavānap puṟattukkum pālaiyūr kiḻavan cirāḷan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā nāna Atikārikaḷ vīraviccātiramūveḷār Āḻvārkku Appa Amutukku tiruttina nilattukku vaṭapārkellai tirunan=tavānam vīracoḻan tirunan=tavānattukku teṟkum Āka Iṉnānkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam I Innilam Aṭaifor raiyum Ivaḷ tan perāl ceyvikkiṟa tirunan=tavānam kuṇavallikku tanta nantavānam ka Aṭuttuk kuṭutta ku vilaiyāka
Āḻvār cipaṇṭārattu Ivaḷ Oṭukkiṉa kācu Onṟu Ikkācu Onṟum Innila Araikkum vilaiyākak koṇṭu Ittirunantavānam kuṇavallikku tiru nantavānapuṟamāka māvaraikkum Iṟai puncey varicaippaṭi veli Onṟukku Eṇkalamāka vanta nellu Innila kaṭavitākavum Itil I� pokaṅkoṇṭu Ittirunantavānañ ceyvār
ṇṭu nellukkum puṭavai mutalukkup perāl kācu Onṟukku māka Iṭṭut tirunanta vanam ceyvatākavum Innilattukku puncey varicaippaṭiyāy Uḷḷa kaṭamai Allatu Antarāyaṅ kācum ve maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa cilavarikaḷum ve tiruvācili kaikaḷ Epperpaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭavita(nā)kavum Ippiramāṇappaṭiye rājama
hentiran tiruccuṟṟumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭik koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Ipparicu Icaintu Ippeṇṭāṭṭi kaṭavūr Uṭaiyāḷukku Innilam Araiyum Aṭuttukkuṭut tom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvaiyiṣṇavakka vāykkula muṭaiyān Eḻuttu sabhaikkaṇakku ciṟṟamparuṭaiyān tillaikki ṟaivan Eḻuttu Itu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 24.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
